text:
*[Bug 18994] New: ASAN error with contextstack overflows*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=18994>

            Bug ID: 18994
           Summary: ASAN error with contextstack overflows
           Product: R
           Version: R-devel (trunk)
          Hardware: Other
                OS: Linux
            Status: UNCONFIRMED
          Severity: normal
          Priority: P5
         Component: Low-level
          Assignee: <mailto:R-core@R-project.org|R-core@R-project.org>
          Reporter: <mailto:kevinushey@gmail.com|kevinushey@gmail.com>

It looks like the R parser incorrectly checks the context stack bounds, leading
to an out-of-bounds write when e.g. there are 50 open parentheses.

```
> parse(text = "{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{{")
=================================================================
==1688872==ERROR: AddressSanitizer: global-buffer-overflow on address
0x7f7002f48092 at pc 0x7f7000cd378e bp 0x7ffe257c4810 sp 0x7ffe257c4808
WRITE of size 1 at 0x7f7002f48092 thread T0
    #0 0x7f7000cd378d in yylex /home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/gram.c:6308
    #1 0x7f7000cd378d in Rf_yyparse
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/gram.c:2186
    #2 0x7f7000ce550c in R_Parse1
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/gram.c:4043
    #3 0x7f7000ce6f1c in R_Parse /home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/gram.c:4202
    #4 0x7f7000ce7f72 in R_ParseVector
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/gram.c:4290
    #5 0x7f7000f9b1a4 in do_parse
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/source.c:286
    #6 0x7f7000c1a483 in bcEval_loop
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/eval.c:8132
    #7 0x7f7000c6d064 in bcEval /home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/eval.c:7515
    #8 0x7f7000c6db85 in Rf_eval /home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/eval.c:1167
    #9 0x7f7000c7b90b in R_execClosure
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/eval.c:2389
    #10 0x7f7000c7bc84 in applyClosure_core
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/eval.c:2302
    #11 0x7f7000c7f46c in Rf_applyClosure
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/eval.c:2324
    #12 0x7f7000c6fafd in Rf_eval
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/eval.c:1280
    #13 0x7f7000d61c45 in Rf_ReplIteration
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/main.c:264
    #14 0x7f7000d621f3 in R_ReplConsole
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/main.c:317
    #15 0x7f7000d6237f in run_Rmainloop
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/main.c:1235
    #16 0x7f7000d623cc in Rf_mainloop
/home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/main.c:1242
    #17 0x0000004004f3 in main /home/kevin/r-devel/trunk/src/main/Rmain.c:29
    #18 0x7f6fffa105b4 in __libc_start_call_main (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x35b4)
(BuildId: 57f6900d44d37352280570abdffc4f01a1803226)
    #19 0x7f6fffa10667 in __libc_start_main@@GLIBC_2.34
(/lib64/libc.so.6+0x3667) (BuildId: 57f6900d44d37352280570abdffc4f01a1803226)
    #20 0x0000004003e4 in _start
(/home/kevin/r/r-devel-sanitizers/lib64/R/bin/exec/R+0x4003e4) (BuildId:
a96b5b8788e93e4b9d0462028242bff17a2aceb1)
```

I suspect there is an off-by-one error in checking the context stack size in
gram.c, for the various open bracket cases.
